summary: PR 2356 made a focused matching fix in ftCo_DownBound.c for ftCo_80097D88. The diff converted the former function body into a static helper named inlineA1, changed Fighter access from gobj->user_data to GET_FIGHTER(gobj), and made ftCo_80097D88 call that helper. The bot report says ftCo_80097D88 became one new 100% match worth +56 bytes.

key_files.role: Only changed source file; contains ftCo_80097D88 matching adjustment and nearby DownBound functions.

what_changed.text: Changed Fighter retrieval inside the moved body from direct user_data access to GET_FIGHTER(gobj).
The PR reported one new match for main/melee/ft/chara/ftCommon/ftCo_DownBound item ftCo_80097D88, moving that item from 0.00% to 100.00% for +56 bytes.

decomp_lessons.lesson: For small fighter functions, a match may depend on whether the public symbol is a thin wrapper around a static helper rather than carrying the full body directly.
